examples: Hypnosis helped me give up smoking.
He uses hypnosis as part of the treatment.
Bevin is now an adult and has re-lived her birth experience under hypnosis.
Treatments include cognitive behaviour therapy, which helps people to break the cycle of faulty thinking, and hypnosis.
Labels mark sections on such topics as mentalism, ventriloquism, juggling, hypnosis, escapology, sleight-of-hand and cheating at gambling.
